title: IIOHR Certificate in Hair Loss Consultation and Clinical Patient Coordination
workingTitle: IIOHR Certificate in Hair Loss Consultation & Clinical Patient Coordination
overview: A structured consultant and nurse academy pathway focused on safer consultation support, ethical patient communication, documentation, triage support, and coordinated care in hair restoration.
whoItsFor: Consultants and nurse educators working in hair restoration clinics
Patient coordinators and treatment coordinators supporting doctor-led pathways
Senior patient-facing staff who require structured clinical literacy within a clear scope of practice
whyItMatters: Professionalises the front line of the patient journey
Improves patient safety, trust, and doctor handover quality
Creates a scalable clinic-facing education and licensing foundation
deliveryModel: Standards-led online curriculum with modular progression
Competency-led completion with certificate, badge, and transcript outputs
certificationSummary: The pathway supports a Certificate of Completion, Competency Record, and Digital Badge
Final award eligibility is based on competency achievement, assessment thresholds, and mandatory safety domain passes
clinicLicensingSummary: Program architecture is designed to support future clinic licensing dashboards and staff enrolment at scale
Manager and educator oversight can be added on top of the same shared operational layer
faqSummary: The program develops competency in consultation support, patient education, and care coordination
It does not grant independent diagnostic authority or replace regulated surgical training

duration.pacingModel: level-based online delivery with flexible clinic scheduling
